parameters.name: op
parameters.label: Operator
parameters.description: The path of the node that the Info is getting information from. You can drag and drop any node onto this path, or type the path directly into the field.

parameters.name: infotype
parameters.label: Info Type
parameters.description: Select the channel set associated with the Info Type.

parameters.name: iscope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: The names of the attributes to keep. Name patterns may be used as detailed in .

parameters.name: values
parameters.label: Values
parameters.description: Select channel with values inside or outside the range specified in .

parameters.name: passive
parameters.label: Passive
parameters.description: When Passive is Off the Info will cook the it is pointing to before querying its values. When Passive is On it will not force a cook. A side effect: If the Info and the target are both cooking that fr

parameters.name: childcooktime
parameters.label: Children Cook Time
parameters.description: When the Info is monitoring a , this toggle will enable a channel called which is the total cooktime of all the component's children. This is off by default, enabling it for a large network may impact

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: range2
parameters.label: Range2
parameters.description: Set the bounds for selecting channels by value.
